headline: Dollar General Falconer Closure Raises Questions On Safety And Valuation
summary: Dollar General Market in Falconer has been temporarily closed following an inspection that found safety-related code violations. Issues cited include roof leaks and potential mold, raising concerns for both customer and employee safety. The closure adds to operational and compliance questions for Dollar General, NYSE:DG, at a time when store conditions are under closer scrutiny. For investors watching Dollar General, NYSE:DG, this local closure comes amid a mixed share price backdrop. The...

headline: Oracle earnings, February CPI, housing data: What to Watch
summary: Market Domination Overtime Host Jared Blikre previews several of the biggest stories to come throughout next week, including earnings results from Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE), Kohl's (KSS), Oracle (ORCL), and Adobe (ADBE); February's Consumer Price Index survey (CPI) results; and the latest readings on NFIB Optimism Index and US existing home sales. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination Overtime.
